title: Catch up on 12 major I/O 2026 moments
author: Zahra Thompson Contributing writer
raw_description: Here are 12 of the biggest Google I/O 2026 keynote moments, including news about Gemini Omni, Gemini 3.5 Flash and more.
summary: Google I/O 2026主题演讲回顾，重点介绍Gemini Omni、Gemini 3.5 Flash等12项重大AI技术发布。
analysis_note: 内容为发布会回顾，涉及重要模型但信息有限，技术深度一般，适合关注行业动态。
